rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CALVIN LEE
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. 1) The amended petition continues to request distribution of the minor beneficiary's share of the estate to the petitioner as custodian under the Uniform Transfers to Minors Act, despite the Court's directive at the 12/28/2021 hearing that the distribution must be made to the minor's court-appointed guardian of the estate. On 08/16/2022, the Court appointed the petitioner as guardian of the estate of the minor beneficiary, but the petitioner is not qualified to receive final distribution of the minor's assets from this estate, as no letters have been issued to the petitioner as the minor's guardian. 2) The amended petition accounted for income and expenses of Clee Property LLC of which the decedent was a 25% member as receipts and disbursements of this estate, even though the estate received no actual distribution from the LLC. 3) The petitioner filed a second supplemental inventory and appraisal listing 25% of the cash balance of each bank account held by the LLC or its rental property management agent as additional assets of the estate. The petitioner's attorney requests additional statutory compensation by including the LLC bank accounts in the fee base. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF RAMON CASILLAS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petiton For Authority To Pay Conservatee An Allowance For Personal Use Pursuant To Probate Code Section 2421
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. 1) Notice of this petition has not been given to the conservatee's separated spouse. No order dispensing with notice to the conservatee's spouse has been issued. 2) The conservator has been paying allowances to the conservatee ($50 per week) without prior court approval since July 2022. The conservator requests ratification of the past allowances and authority to continue paying $50 to the conservatee as his weekly allowance before filing the first account. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.
